    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Contract
    Represents a contract for a student's accommodation in a room.
    ContractDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) for handling CRUD operations for the Contract entity.
    DatabaseHandler
    Handles database connections for the application.
    Faculty
    Represents a faculty entity.
    FacultyDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) for handling CRUD operations for the Faculty entity.
    HelloApplication
    The main entry point for the JavaFX application.
    HelloController
    The main controller for the application's user interface.
    Launcher
    A launcher class to start the JavaFX application.
    PropertiesBundleProvider
    A custom ResourceBundleProvider to ensure that .properties files are loaded with UTF-8 encoding.
    Room
    Represents a room entity in the dormitory.
    RoomDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) for handling CRUD operations for the Room entity.
    Student
    Represents a student entity.
    StudentDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) for handling CRUD operations for the Student entity.
    UTF8Control
    A custom ResourceBundle.Control implementation that forces reading of .properties files in UTF-8 encoding.
